To: L. Hassan
From: PC
Subject: Tomorrow's status meeting — quick look

Hi L,

Thanks for sharing. I had a look at the invite. Overall I think it is set up well and you are right that adding the vendor decision is efficient given everyone will be in the room.

A couple of small thoughts:

- The agenda covers the main areas (status, vendor, Q&A, AOB) which is good. I would just make sure we leave enough time for the vendor discussion since it is important.
- 14 attendees is a lot but I think it is fine for a status meeting — better to have everyone in the loop.
- It would be great to have a pre-read for the vendor decision but given the short timeline tomorrow morning we will probably just brief in the room. Quick and pragmatic.

For facilitation I would just suggest running a tight meeting and making sure we cover everything in the hour. Good engagement from all the leads will be key.

V. Bauer attending is good — it gives the team visibility with the sponsor. T. Adeyemi attending is fine too — leadership visibility is a positive thing for the team.

In terms of meeting hygiene more broadly, I think we should keep the cadence as is. The team is used to the rhythm and changing it now mid-programme could be disruptive.

Let me know if you want me to help with anything specific for tomorrow.

Best,
PC
